title: helichrysum pumilum
intro: Helichrysum pumilum, also known as the tiny strawflower, is a perennial plant that belongs to the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, due to the presence of sesquiterpene compounds. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing pain and swelling, promoting wound healing, and alleviating digestive issues. Helichrysum pumilum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or essential oils, which are often used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
